articles.title: Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple. Here's a look at his 15-year legacy, from new products and services to China expansion. - TechCrunch
articles.description: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.
articles.content: After 15 years at the helm, Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple and handing over the reins to the companys senior vice president of hardware engineering, John Ternus. Cook, who joined Apple in … [+5542 chars]

articles.title: Wearable health tech might be Tim Cook’s greatest legacy - The Verge
articles.description: The Apple Watch was the first product under Tim Cook in the post-Jobs era. It defined the blueprint for the modern health tech era.
articles.content: Wearable health tech might be Tim Cooks greatest legacy  Cook once said Apples greatest contribution to mankind would be about health. If true, hell get much of… [+7498 chars]

articles.title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes - TechCrunch
articles.description: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.
articles.content: Google Photos’ image editor is getting new touch-up tools to allow users to apply subtle edits and fixes, Google announced on Monday. You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin textur… [+800 chars]
